# MAS Contractors LLC

> MAS Contractors LLC is a licensed Class A General Contractor headquartered at 411 Branchway Rd Suite 107, North Chesterfield, Virginia 23236. We serve Richmond, Chesterfield County, Midlothian, Glen Allen, and Henrico, VA. Phone: (804) 833-4600. Website: mascontractors.com. Founded in 2014. Certified James Hardie installer. Free estimates on all projects.

## Who We Are

MAS Contractors LLC is a Class A licensed and fully insured general contracting company based in North Chesterfield, Virginia. We have completed over 500 projects across the Richmond metro area including residential remodeling, commercial build-outs, and specialty work in roofing, siding, and finish carpentry. Our team has 11+ years of experience serving homeowners and businesses in Chesterfield County, Henrico County, Richmond City, Midlothian, and Glen Allen.

## Services

- **Kitchen Remodeling** — Custom cabinets, countertops, flooring, layout redesign. Starting from $15,000. Service area: Richmond VA, Chesterfield VA, Midlothian VA.
- **Bathroom Remodeling** — Tile showers, vanities, full gut renovations. Starting from $8,000.
- **Home Additions** — Room additions, sunrooms, second-story additions. Custom quotes.
- **Roofing** — Full roof replacement, repair, gutters. Residential and commercial.
- **Siding** — Certified James Hardie fiber cement siding installer. Vinyl siding. Full exterior.
- **Trim & Carpentry** — Crown molding, wainscoting, coffered ceilings, built-ins, custom millwork.
- **Tile Work** — Floor tile, shower tile, backsplash, large format tile. Residential and commercial.
- **Deck Building** — Composite and wood decks with railings and stairs.
- **Windows & Doors** — Energy-efficient replacement windows, entry doors, sliding doors.
- **Commercial Construction** — Office build-outs, tenant improvements, commercial remodeling (e.g., Berkadia project in Richmond, VA).
- **Full Home Renovations** — Gut renovations, whole-house remodels.

## Service Area

Primary: North Chesterfield VA, Chesterfield County VA, Midlothian VA
Secondary: Richmond VA, Henrico VA, Glen Allen VA, Short Pump VA, Bon Air VA, Brandermill VA
